{{Infobox concept
| name = Luminous Queen
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Luminous [[Queen]] is the [[Monarch]] of the [[Ninecloud Court]]. While she is identified as [[Sha Leiala]], it is believed that she has not appeared openly for several years following the death of her mother. In her absence, a disguise consisting of multicolored [[madra]] has been used to create the illusion that [[Sha Leiala]] is still present, though some suggest this is merely a way to represent her. Her true identity and name are kept secret, known only to the [[Sha family]], their direct servants, and other [[Monarchs]]. Her daughter, [[Mercy]], is an [[Archlord]] who possesses the ability to transfer power from her mother through a [[Path]] known as [[Celestial Radiance]]. The Luminous [[Queen]]'s authority can be extended to others via the [[Queen’s Gift]], a divine treasure that allows individuals to borrow both her political and conceptual power. [[Sha Miara]] is also identified as the chosen of the Luminous [[Queen]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Luminous Queen]] is the true identity of [[Sha Miara]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Luminous Queen]] is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Luminous Queen]] is addressed by [[Kiuran]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Luminous Queen]] has made several interesting addresses recently.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Luminous Queen]] has a Right Hand named [[Sha Relliar]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Luminous Queen]] can leave behind crystallized commands known as [[the Queen]]'s [[Gift]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Luminous Queen]] is an [[Archlord]] of the [[Sha family]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
